content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (from Topic A's ICM-based autonomous agents) can be repurposed to prioritize which new experiences an active learning agent (from Topic B) stores in its long-term memory, creating a self-filtering memory system that outperforms 2024 SOTA fixed-size memory retention rules. This system automatically retains only high-uncertainty, learning-improving experiences that align with the agent's ongoing knowledge acquisition goals.
